name: Steampipe
description: Steampipe — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Cloud Governance & Query.

seo.title: Steampipe Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Steampipe is a Compliance Automation tool.
pros: Continuous evidence collection saves audit preparation time
cons: Initial control mapping requires significant setup effort
